Here’s the official trailer for Brick, premiering on Netflix on July 10, 2025:


---

🎬 What we know so far:

Plot premise: Tim (Matthias Schweighöfer) and Olivia (Ruby O. Fee) wake up trapped in their apartment—completely surrounded by an impenetrable brick wall that appeared overnight. Their entire building is now sealed off, and they must band together with neighbors to survive and uncover why this happened  .

Genre & tone: A tense German thriller blending psychological horror, sci-fi mystery, and claustrophobic survival elements  .



---

🧩 Plot twist?

As of today, there’s no confirmed plot twist revealed in public sources. Neither trailers nor articles discuss what lies beneath the wall’s origin, or any shocking reversal—only that there’s a looming mystery around who built it and why. Unless you come across leaks or early reviews once it's released, the twist remains under wraps.


---

✅ Bottom line:

Expect a suspenseful build-up around the strange brick barrier and the fight to escape. The key twist—whatever it may be—is being tightly guarded for release day. Stay tuned once it hits Netflix for full spoiler coverage!


---
